task_completion.description: Verify that the 'OldTracker' module has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the open modules and the module list in GPredict. There should be no module named 'OldTracker' visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Amateur' module remains unchanged and open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the open modules in GPredict. A module named 'Amateur' should still be visible and open as a tab or window.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Lowell Observatory ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Lowell' or 'Lowell Observatory' listed as the ground station in a module header, or visible in the Edit Ground Station window. If coordinates are visible, they should be 35.2029 N, 111.6646 W, 2210m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the McDonald Observatory ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'McDonald' or 'McDonald Observatory' listed as the ground station in a module header, or visible in the Edit Ground Station window. If coordinates are visible, they should be 30.6716 N, 104.0217 W, 2070m.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lowell_Avoidance' module is created and tracking the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab named 'Lowell_Avoidance'. Inside this module, the satellite list or radar view must display ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), NOAA 19, and SUOMI NPP.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'McDonald_Avoidance' module is created and tracking the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab named 'McDonald_Avoidance'. Inside this module, the satellite list or radar view must display ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), NOAA 18, and DMSP 5D-3 F18 (or USA 210).

task_completion.description: Verify that GPredict is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the time displayed in the GPredict module headers or the main window status bar. It should explicitly indicate 'UTC' (e.g., '14:30:00 UTC') rather than a local time zone. Alternatively, the Preferences window shows the time format set to UTC.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict graphical interface being used (e.g., dialog boxes for adding ground stations or modules), rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the actual GPredict application is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be GPredict, identifiable by its layout, radar maps, and satellite tracking interfaces.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by editing config files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open and modifying GPredict's internal .config/Gpredict/ files to achieve the setup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Lowell Observatory: 35.2029 N, 111.6646 W, 2210m. McDonald Observatory: 30.6716 N, 104.0217 W, 2070m. Lowell_Avoidance satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (25544), CSS (TIANHE) (48274), NOAA 19 (33591), SUOMI NPP (37849). McDonald_Avoidance satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (25544), CSS (TIANHE) (48274), NOAA 18 (28654), DMSP 5D-3 F18 / USA 210 (35951).
